{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Nebula Runners
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Nebula Runners]] are experienced smugglers.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c11">''The Engineer'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Nebula Runners]] were killed by [[Steel Avalanche]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c28">''The Engineer'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
